emails.subject: Meter 980070; Oct 99
emails.body: Meter 980070; Oct 99 Daren, There are two purchases at the above referenced meter for the 28th of Oct., 1999. Gas flowed without a purchase from the29th through the 31st. Please let me know if we should be paying the swing parties(deal tickets117738 and 120359) or how I should allocate the volume. Thank you for your time and patience!! Mary Jane ext. 35251
